howItWorks.heading: How Blossom works
howItWorks.step1Text: Tell us who you are, what you're into, and what you're looking for.
howItWorks.step2Text: Browse profiles and like the ones who share your vibe - no endless swiping.
howItWorks.step3Text: Matched? Chat for a bit, then take it offline - that's the whole point.
